meaning: n.&adj.[生化]有机磷酸酯(的)(现广泛用作杀虫剂、抑燃剂等)
examples: Yang Hua Le Guo is an organophosphate pesticide of a kind widely used in China.
Objective To investigate the clinical features and treatment of intermediate syndrome of acute organophosphate poisoning (IMS).
The inside surfaces of some traps are coated with an organophosphate pesticide. Mosquitoes that land there will die within 24 hours.
Commercial preparations of diatomaceous earth did as well as the organophosphate in all cases bar one (a beetle called the lesser grain borer in sorghum).
In a representative sample of produce tested by the agency, 28 percent of frozen blueberries, 20 percent of celery, and 25 percent of strawberries contained traces of one type of organophosphate.
